channel.title: AI Tools Hub
channel.description: Honest AI tool reviews for small business owners

item.title: AI Tools for Building Websites Without Code 2026
item.description: Build beautiful websites without coding in 2026 using AI tools. I tested 15 no-code builders with AI. Complete guide for non-technical people.

item.title: AI Tools for Event Planners 2026
item.description: AI tools for event planners in 2026. Tested with major event companies. Recommendations for planning, budgeting, coordination, and attendee experience.

item.title: AI for Manufacturing & Supply Chain 2026
item.description: AI tools for manufacturing and supply chain in 2026. Tested with Fortune 500 manufacturers. Recommendations for optimization, quality, and cost reduction.

item.title: Best AI for Non-Profit Organizations 2026
item.description: AI tools for nonprofits in 2026. Tested tools that fit nonprofit budgets. Recommendations for fundraising, donor management, volunteer coordination, and impact

item.title: AI 3D Printing and Additive Manufacturing Tools | AI Tools Hub
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming 3D printing and additive manufacturing in 2026. From generative design to process monitoring—tools, pricing, and real results.

item.title: AI A/B Testing Tools 2026: Optimize Without Guessing | VWO, Evolv AI, Intellimize, AB Tasty & More | AI Tools Hub
item.description: Tested AI-powered A/B testing tools that learn and adapt in real time. VWO, Evolv AI, Intellimize, AB Tasty, and Statsig compared on real ecommerce data — pricing, setup complexity, and actual lift.

item.title: AI Academic Research Tools 2026: From Literature Review to Publication | AI Tools Hub
item.description: I tested Elicit, Consensus, SciSpace, Scite, and Paperpal for academic research. Here's how AI tools handle literature reviews, data extraction, and manuscript writing in 2026.

item.description: Discover the best AI accessibility tools transforming independence in 2026. From voice control to screen readers, explore AI solutions for disabilities.
